title: Weep and Cower
description: This pack changes the creaking's model and texture to look more visual pleasing.
body:
### _Do you think that the current texture and model of the creaking is a bit bland?_ 
Well, I may have the pack for you! This pack changes the model and texture of the new Creaking to a more aesthetically pleasing look, with more branches and moss hanging off of its body. Weep and Cower in the dark, for the Creaking roams!![Creaking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13533e72a9756bf02a95779f19fd21e4b7ddf97.png)
#

### Requirements:
> [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)  
>  [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
#

### Planned Changes:
- Changing the textures of the new 1.21.3 Pale Garden blocks and items
- Changing the textures of the Pale Oak wood set
